reason:
File the FT-046 follow-on. The MCP tools product_feature_status and
product_test_status are no-op stubs that return a misleading success
envelope without writing the file. Confirmed empirically: 11 TC status
updates via MCP, every file unchanged on disk, graph check still reported
old statuses. The "Use CLI for status updates with full side-effects" note
buried in the payload is the only signal of failure — easy for an LLM (or
human) to miss. Slice functions feature::plan_status_change and
tc::plan_status_change already exist; this feature wires MCP to them.
